overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval rural village during golden hour. The character travels along a dirt path past wooden fences and thatched-roof structures, crosses a stone bridge over water, and continues through open countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village path with wooden fences and thatched huts

events.description: passing a canvas tent stall with an NPC villager standing nearby

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the village dirt path with two swords strapped to his back

notable_agents.action: villager standing near a canvas tent stall beside the path

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence lining the right side of the dirt path
traditional wooden hut with straw thatched roof and open sides
tall wooden defensive tower with thatched roof and elevated platform
temporary canvas shelter with wooden support poles

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through a rural medieval village during golden hour. Wooden fences line the right side while thatched-roof huts appear on the left. A canvas tent stall comes into view with a villager standing nearby, and a tall wooden watchtower rises in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge crossing over water with wooden guard tower

events.description: stepping from dirt path onto the stone bridge surface
passing a wooden cart loaded with sacks on the left side of the bridge

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the stone bridge over the water, approaching the wooden guard tower

entered.detail: arched stone bridge with cobblestone surface and low stone walls crossing over water
two-story wooden watchtower with external staircase and thatched roof
tall wooden pole with red and black banner waving in the wind
calm water body visible beneath and beyond the bridge
wooden wagon cart loaded with burlap sacks parked on the bridge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions onto a stone bridge crossing a body of water. Geralt walks across the cobblestone surface toward a wooden guard tower with an external staircase. A flagpole with a red banner stands at the far end of the bridge, and a wooden cart loaded with sacks sits on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path with stone walls and scattered farm buildings

events.description: exiting the stone bridge onto the open country dirt path
overtaking an armored NPC walking ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the dirt path through open countryside, passing another traveler

notable_agents.action: armored character with sword walking ahead on the path in the same direction

entered.detail: low stone wall lining the left side of the country path
cluster of wooden buildings and huts visible in the distant countryside

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the bridge onto a wide-open dirt path through the countryside. A low stone wall runs along the left while wooden fences line the right. An armored NPC walks ahead on the path, and distant village buildings are visible across the fields as the path continues toward the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural medieval village that gradually opens into a wide countryside landscape during the golden hour. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path lined by wooden fences and thatched-roof huts, passing a canvas tent stall as a tall wooden watchtower looms in the distance. The scene then transitions onto a cobblestone bridge crossing a body of water, moving past a cart loaded with sacks toward a guard tower and a red banner. As Geralt exits the bridge, the environment expands into an open dirt path flanked by a low stone wall and wooden fences. The shot finally follows an armored NPC walking ahead through the fields, with the distant village buildings receding toward the horizon.
